column1: # Apworld manifest — downloaded into the generator image's custom_worlds/ at build time
# by scripts/fetch_apworlds.py (see Dockerfile.generator). Edit this file to add/remove
# games; no .apworld binaries are vendored in the repo.
#   name   - human label (the saved filename is taken from the URL
#   url    - direct download URL for the .apworld

column2: the download must match (use this when pinning)

column1: # DEFAULT = latest: point url at GitHub's `releases/latest/download/<file>.apworld` so the
# build always grabs the newest release. Leave sha256 empty.
# TO PIN (when a new release breaks): swap the url to a specific tag and add its checksum:
# Lines starting with # and blank lines are ignored.
